title: cyphomandra cylindrica
intro: Cyphomandra cylindrica, also known as the tree tomato or tamarillo, is a type of fruit-bearing shrub native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have potential health benefits such as reducing blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. The fruit of the Cyphomandra cylindrica plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and juices, which are said to have various health benefits. In addition, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make medicinal extracts, which are used to treat various ailments such as fever and digestive issues.
